User.title: User Profile
User.description: Stores user profile configurations, stats, streak, and XP

uid.description: The unique user identifier matching Auth UID

streak.description: Daily active study learning streak count

lastActive.description: ISO date representing when the user was last active

Course.title: Course Information
Course.description: Standardized dynamic courses available or generated by AI in LearnAI

category.description: Broad category like Marketing, Fotografia, Programacion

level.description: Standard level of standard course difficulty

imageType.description: Key identifier to map standard visual icons

isAIGenerated.description: Whether this course was generated dynamically by the Gemini tutor

createdBy.description: User UID who generated this, or 'system'

UserCourseProgress.title: User Course Enrolled Progress
UserCourseProgress.description: Keeps track of a user's enrollment and progress levels inside a course

courseId.description: The unique course ID linked to study

courseTitle.description: Course name cached for UI list render safety

lastStudiedAt.description: ISO timestamp of last activity in this course

TutorChatMessage.title: AI Tutor Chat Message
TutorChatMessage.description: Saves conversational messages exchanged with the AI tutor

userId.description: User UID to whom this thread belongs

courseId.description: Enables chat contextual filtering for the course

StudyLesson.title: User Study Plan Lesson
StudyLesson.description: Item in the user's daily study agenda

id.description: Unique identifier of study plan lesson

users/{userId}.description: Private profile of the authenticated learner

courses/{courseId}.description: Global list of official or userAI generated courses

users/{userId}/progress/{progressId}.description: List of courses representing the user's current paths and completion level

users/{userId}/chat/{chatId}.description: Contextual conversations held with the virtual interactive tutor

users/{userId}/studyplan/{lessonId}.description: Daily study agenda list scheduled automatically or custom created
